授業目的: This course introduces you to basic writing. You will learn how to write a simple paragraphs on a variety of topics. Writing will be treated as a process with opportunities for you to edit and revise your work with the help of your instructor.
到達目標: This course introduces you to basic writing. You will learn how to write a simple paragraphs on a variety of topics. Writing will be treated as a process with opportunities for you to edit and revise your work with the help of your instructor.
授業方法: Lecture / Book Practice Exercises / Writing Assignments

第1回:
Start-up Week – Online Class 《90minutes》
Introduction
Book and online homework registration & explanation
第2回:
Core Class 1 《90minutes》
Unit 1 
What is a paragraph?
Grammar - Simple Present
Four Features of a Good Paragraph
Mechanics - Capitalization and End Punctuation

Flextime 《20minutes》
Unit 1 Grammar Activities online at learn.eltngl.com

Core Class 2 《90minutes》
Unit 1

Writing

トピック.授業計画1: This course introduces you to basic writing. Students will learn how to write a simple paragraphs on a variety of topics. Writing will be treated as a process with opportunities for you to edit and revise your work with the help of your instructor.
トピック.授業外学習2:
All final papers will need to be typed on A４ paper using 12 point and Times New Roman fonts.
Students will need a USB memory stick to store all class materials and work.
Students MUST have an active e-mail account either with their Kwansei Gakuin e-mail, gmail, hotmail, or yahoomail.

教科書/Required texts1: Keith S. Folse / April Muchmore-Vokoun / Elena Vestri
Great Writing 5th Edition Book 2 - Great Paragraphs with online workbook
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: 各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading2: 備考　Note Students MUST DO Spark online homework and score a minimum of 40% to pass the class. Failure to do this will result in an automatic failure of the course. Students CANNOT buy a used book.　A NEW book MUST be bought so students can access the online homework.
